reviews.review_description:
This on-rails game has so many problems, I don't even know where to start. Actually, I do. You might want to get rid of the tutorial hint screen that shows the basic controls during gameplay, rather than leaving it pasted up on the upper right of the screen with no way of getting rid of it.

The only reason this gets two stars is because I'm assuming it's made by the same fine people who brought us Blue Vortex, which is absolutely awesome!
